pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-boot-starter-validation dependency to provide Bean Validation support in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 no longer includes validation starter by default in some configurations or requires explicit declaration for Jakarta Validation API support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from liquibase-maven-plugin to allow Spring Boot parent to manage the version.
Explicitly set spring-boot-starter-data-jpa version to match the parent version in the plugin configuration.

Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for Java 11+ compatibility and modern API usage.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/servic.general_idea: Replace manual session invalidation with Spring Security's request.logout() for proper cleanup.
Remove unused imports for RequestMapping and RequestMethod.
Add import for the new GetMapping annotation.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/web/QR.general_idea: Replace verbose @RequestMapping with specific @GetMapping annotation for cleaner code.
Remove unused import for RequestMethod as it is no longer referenced in the code.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Fix indentation of datasource configuration to align with Spring Boot 3 YAML binding expectations.
src/main/resources/application.yml.why_exists: Incorrect indentation in YAML can lead to properties not being bound correctly to the DataSource configuration class in Spring Boot 3.
